Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing for Apache Cassandra accounts

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Successful password bruteforcing for account {subject.application.account.name} in application {event_src.title} on host {src.ip}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
Password bruteforcing attempts for account {subject.application.account.name} in application {event_src.title} on host {src.ip}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.
